name: Merino Wool Half-Zip Sweater
description: A half-zip Merino sweater that sits between a crew neck and a shirt — enough structure to wear alone, without needing anything underneath.
whyThisFitsMyArchive: This is the piece I reach for when a plain crewneck feels too casual but a shirt feels like too much effort. The zip gives it just enough structure to read as considered.
whatItReplaces: Doesn't replace the crew neck — it sits one register above it for days that need slightly more structure without going as far as a full shirt-and-jacket outfit.
whyIChooseThis: Over a crew neck: the half-zip works alone for slightly dressier settings. Over a full quarter-zip jacket: this stays a layering piece, not outerwear.
whatItPairsWithInMyCollection: Worn alone with the wool trousers. Layered over the Supima tee or linen shirt when it's cooler.
layeringCombinations: Alone with the wool trousers. Over the Supima tee or linen shirt when it's cooler.
colourCombinations: Navy and charcoal, matching the rest of the cold-weather knitwear so nothing needs separate styling logic.
bestOccasions: Smart-casual, the middle ground between a t-shirt and a full shirt-and-jacket outfit
costPerWearReasoning: ₹8,490 for a piece I don't own yet — the honest case for buying it is thin until the crew neck genuinely stops covering the gap it's meant to fill.
whatMakesItTimeless: Merino ages well and the half-zip silhouette hasn't meaningfully changed in decades.
whatProblemItSolves: A smart-casual middle ground between a t-shirt and a full shirt-and-jacket outfit.
whatCouldReplaceIt: The merino crewneck covers most of the same ground, but the half-zip earns its place on days that need slightly more structure.
similarPiecesIWouldProbablyLike: Massimo Dutti Merino Crew Neck (same fabric philosophy).
layeringOver: the Supima tee or linen shirt
alternativeUnder3000: Uniqlo Extra Fine Merino Half-Zip (~₹2,990 at uniqlo.com/in) — same result at half the cost
alternativeUnder10000: COS Merino Half-Zip (~₹6,000-₹8,000 import via cos.com)
premiumAlternative: Ralph Lauren Purple Label Half-Zip Cashmere (~₹60,000 import)
buyRecommendation: Wait for Sale — identical logic to the crewneck. Buy Uniqlo first; upgrade to MD half-zip only at clearance.
